# Copilot Instructions

Use the root `AGENTS.md` as the source of truth for this repository.

Key reminders:

- Use Bun only; never npm, yarn, or pnpm.
- Preserve user edits and check `git status --short` before editing.
- For VS Code extension work, use `.github/skills/vscode-extension-dev/SKILL.md`.
- Do not ask @jonmagic to perform routine UX testing; gather concrete validation evidence yourself.
